## Meeting Purpose

[Strategy Sprint Standup to discuss progress and next steps across multiple client projects.](https://fathom.video/share/5zoUgMroB8qYJG4zU5axviftoRy2qUp9?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Significant progress on content creation: 20 articles published for Guides, 4 blogs ready for Monograph](https://fathom.video/share/5zoUgMroB8qYJG4zU5axviftoRy2qUp9?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [Challenges with Google Search Console indexing quota and scope creep for Metronome project](https://fathom.video/share/5zoUgMroB8qYJG4zU5axviftoRy2qUp9?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)
  - [New LLM text file workflow being developed, estimated 1-2 weeks for completion](https://fathom.video/share/5zoUgMroB8qYJG4zU5axviftoRy2qUp9?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [AI cybersecurity content research initiated for Sentinel One, requiring manual keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/5zoUgMroB8qYJG4zU5axviftoRy2qUp9?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)

## Topics

### Content Creation Progress
